commands.summary: Telnyx adapter: send maps to SendResult and propagates rejection; capabilities + missing-credential validation; inbound SMS and MMS-metadata normalization; status normalization; Ed25519 webhook signature validates and rejects tampering/wrong-timestamp/missing-key. HTTP: a signed Telnyx inbound is stored, a duplicate webhook is idempotent on the provider message ID, and a bad signature is rejected with 403. All Twilio/server tests stay green.
68 node tests pass, 1 skipped (live Twilio), renderer interaction suite green.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 2 complete. CLV-007: Telnyx is the second SMS/MMS edge behind the channel contract - JSON Bearer send, JSON webhook normalization, Ed25519-signed /webhooks/telnyx endpoint, registered when configured; contract tests cover send success/rejection, inbound SMS, inbound MMS metadata, duplicate inbound webhook (idempotent), delivery status, invalid signature, and missing credentials (backward/duplicate status transitions are handled by the shared local store, already tested). Telnyx setup is documented (docs/telnyx.md) and represented in a Settings 'Channels and providers' card without breaking Twilio; credentials are env-based for now (the in-app form is folded into 017's cockpit). CLV-008: Plivo and Bandwidth are planning gates (decision 0007) surfaced as planned_channels in diagnostics, not registered as broken adapters.
